mission.title: clickhouse: RFC: Semistructured Columns
mission.description: RFC: Semistructured Columns. Requested by 49+ users.

steps.title: Check current ClickHouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your ClickHouse version:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
The Variant data type requires a recent ClickHouse version.

steps.title: Review semistructured columns
steps.description: ClickHouse introduced the `Variant` data type as part of the semistructured columns RFC. `Variant(T1, T2, ..., TN)` allows each row to hold a value of any specified type or NULL. This replaces the experimental JSON data type.

steps.title: Use the Variant data type
Verify Variant type works

resolution.summary: ClickHouse implemented the Variant data type for semistructured columns, allowing each row to hold values of different types as a better alternative to the experimental JSON type.

prerequisites.description: A working ClickHouse installation with Variant type support.
